problem: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics?
hypothesis: The key to What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics? is Aerogel porosity for thermal/acoustic insulation — specifically Aerogel porosity for — which would help 500,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 29 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
